AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Cadbury Dairy Milk Biscoff Chocolate Block is a delicious sweet treat. It features smooth milk chocolate and crunchy Biscoff. Add it to your cart at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
An iconic collab bringing together two global taste icons. Two favourites together as one in a block. It’s your favourite classic Cadbury chocolate you know and love, united with a biscuit twist you'll adore. Enjoy the delicious blend of smooth & creamy Cadbury Dairy Milk milk chocolate with the unique, crunchy Lotus Biscoff caramelised biscuit.

Cadbury & Biscoff block is the perfect ‘me time’ delicious treat for a cosy night, powering through the afternoon or sharing with friends and family.

Don't miss out on this epic Cadbury & Biscoff block. Taste it now!

Proudly made in Tasmania.

The equivalent of a glass and a half of full cream milk in every 200g of Cadbury Dairy Milk milk chocolate. 

Cadbury is made with sustainably sourced cocoa. We partner with cocoa farmers to help them gain knowledge and skills to improve their livelihoods, strengthen their communities and inspire the next generation of cocoa farmers.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Arnott’s Original Barbecue Shapes offer a rich tomato flavour with loads of herbs on a salty, crispy cracker base. In a shareable box of 8 packs, these barbecue biscuits are big on crunch and even bigger on taste!

Arnott's Originals Cracker Biscuits Barbecue Shapes are delicious oven-baked crackers with loads of flavour you can see. With the BBQ flavours of rich tomato and tangy herbs, this chips multipack is a crowd pleaser. Whether you’re looking for a fun afternoon top-up or an easy snack to have, the 8 individual packs or barbecue biscuits in this shareable multipack are ideal. These BBQ crackers are convenient to share as an exciting treat, or perfect for a fun afternoon snack. With no artificial colours or preservatives, Arnott’s Original BBQ Shapes crackers are a go-to BBQ biscuit for any occasion.

• A rich tomato flavour with loads of herbs on a salty, crispy cracker base.

• Box contains 8 individual packs.

• Flavour you can see.

• Oven baked, not fried.

• Aussie made, Aussie loved.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Twisties Cheese Snacks Multipack. A delicious snack with a cheesy crunch, it's ideal for parties or everyday snacking. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Change Up Life's Expectations
Twisties Corn Rice Snacks Mulitpack of 8 Cheese 152g takes your tastebuds in a whole new and unexpected direction with each bite. Life's pretty straight without Twisties, so try incorporating these cheese snacks into your day to change things up. Expect the unexpected when you pop open a pack of Twisties Cheese.

Pump Up the Party
Invigorate any party's atmosphere when you bring along these multipack snacks. Our cheese snack may be exactly what your parties have been missing. With a twist of cheesy delight and the crunch of uniquely shaped snacks, the party is sure to start pumping. Let your friends and family experience a new level of fun with Australian-made snacking.

Don't Get Snack Time Twisted
Don't get it twisted, cheese snacks aren't a new invention. However, Twisties Cheese takes the nostalgia of crunching into one and makes it exciting with an iconic shape you won't forget. Whether you're looking for lunch snacks to brighten up road trips, or something to portion out when the afternoon rolls around, Twisties has you covered.

Now available in an 8 pack box - easy to store in your pantry and recycle in your kerbside bin!

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Arnott’s Chocolate Scotch Finger biscuits are a decadently delicious twist on the original Scotch Finger biscuit. Crumbly, buttery shortbread half coated in real milk chocolate creates an irresistibly sweet biscuit.

Offering the perfect blend of crunch and smoothness, the original Scotch Finger biscuit – loved for its melt-in-the-mouth crumbliness and heavenly buttery taste – with a delicious milk chocolate coating. It’s perfect to snap, dunk and savour with your favourite morning tea cuppa. If you’re in the mood to share, it’s the perfect half-coated chocolate biscuit for a weekend of socialising. So snap, dunk and enjoy!

• A decadent chocolate twist on the original Scotch Finger biscuit

• Sweet biscuits half coated in real milk chocolate

• Half-coated chocolate biscuits made without artificial colours, flavours and preservatives

• Ideal for a decadent snack or tea time treat

• A perfect companion for your favourite hot beverage

AdditionalAttributes.description:
The Superior Chips and Dip Combo
Just like how Doritos chips are specially designed for optimal scooping and dipping, our Mild Salsa is a Mexican dip experience that’s tailor-made for any corn chip. Our salsa sauce combines overtones of bold Mexican flavour with undertones of tangy ripe tomatoes that’ll make your tastebuds tango! With the classic sweetness that accompanies this mild flavouring, any one of our Dorito chip flavour range has met its heavenly match.

Better for Sharing
A gathering with friends and family just around the corner? Make your prep work easier, and your corn chip and crackers platter spicier with our famous salsa. Our dip is the perfect size to share and pass around, or to stay stationary as the centrepiece of the snack tray. The conveniently-sized jar is easy to pack when making the trip to your friend’s house, or to store at home in preparation for your own next event.

Serve Up with Care
Despite the unbelievably bold and insatiable flavours, our Doritos Mild Salsa contains absolutely no artificial colours or flavours. What’s more, our salsa is suitable for vegetarians and is 99% fat-free so you can feel confident offering delicious options to your guests. The Doritos brand is very focused on serving snack choices with care, and our salsa dip is no different! Don’t hesitate to use it for your household’s Taco Tuesday, or special occasion nachos when you want the love of spice to be shared.

With their lemon flavour and squeezability, Arnott’s Lemon Crisp cream biscuits are the perfect choice for afternoon fun with friends and family. • A perfect balance of sweet and salty

• Ideal for a citrusy pick-me-up

• A refreshing addition to desserts and cheese platters

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Need a great coffee? Moccona Instant Coffee Classic Medium Roast is a delicious and convenient solution for your daily coffee ritual. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Experience the smooth taste of Moccona Classic Medium Roast. Its full-bodied flavour and rich aroma make it the perfect coffee to enjoy everyday.

  • The perfect coffee to enjoy every day.

  • The heritage behind Moccona was born half a world away in the quaint Netherlands’ village of Joure in 1753. Originally sold in delicatessens and small specialty stores, it symbolised the little indulgence from Europe that added to the pleasures of everyday.

  • Known for its premium taste and elegant glass jar, Moccona has become a much-loved classic in homes all over Australia.

  • Moccona blends are created by bringing together the world’s finest beans: Arabica and the Robusta. The Arabica has a softer sweeter taste with berry and fruit tones while the Robusta bean has a deep rich flavour.

  • Together they bring the magical blend and character you expect from the perfect cup of coffee. Every time you smell the aroma of Moccona, you’ll be reminded of the great passion that drives us to create moments of pure indulgence - just for you.

  • Experience the smooth taste of Moccona Classic Medium Roast. Its full-bodied flavour and rich aroma make it the perfect coffee to enjoy everyday.

  • At Moccona we care about coffee, the people who grow it and the planet it comes from.

  • Working together with our preferred partners like UTZ Certified, we help farmers prosper and help to preserve the environment.

Arnott’s Venetian biscuits are a dainty and delicious melt-in-the-mouth sweet biscuit, baked with real currants and with a white choc coating.

These sweet biscuits are a delicate blend of buttery richness and a hint of fruit currants, giving it a crispy texture that melts in your mouth. A sophisticated and classic treat, Arnott's Venetian biscuits bring a little fancy into your everyday. Grab a pack of these delicate sweet biscuits to eat on their own as a me-time treat. Or curl up on the couch with a great book, a plate of Arnott’s Venetian biscuits and your favourite hot cuppa for a slow afternoon tea.

• Melt-in-the-mouth biscuit with real currants and a white choc coating

• A sophisticated and classic sweet treat

• Biscuits made to be dunked

• Ideal for a snack or tea time treat

• Perfectly crafted biscuits to share with loved ones

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Party Snacks Ideal for Entertaining Friends and Family
Doritos is a classic party snack, loved by millions around the world for its iconic intense flavour that’s sure to keep your hands locked inside the packet. We know it’s hard to keep your hands off those tasty triangles and that’s why we’ve made them available in a party size to make sure there’s enough to go around!

Fuel Your Entertainment with Bold Flavour
Our Party Size Doritos Cheese Supreme makes sure that everyone at your next gathering can tuck into some bold cheesy goodness before the pack runs dry. We’re there to liven up the party, no matter the occasion. Whether it’s keeping your classic rager hunger-free, or working hard as a fuel source for your group gaming sessions or a twitch viewing party, there’s always a demand for Doritos. 

Versatile Crunch You Can Add to Any Meal
Doritos are so flavourful you can even sneak them into your meals for that extra oomph of flavour you've been missing. Doritos make a fantastic addition to your meal as a seasoning or to give your dinner that extra crunchy crust or coating you’ve been missing out on. You can even accompany your corn chips with the Doritos Salsa Range for an even tastier munching experience.

Want to Doritos-fy your favourite dishes? Maybe a Doritos-crusted chicken schnitty for that crispy outside crunch or as the perfect tortilla chips for your next beef nachos? Whatever your favourites are, let Doritos inspire your dinner creations.
Licking your lips at the thought? The Doritos Cheese Supreme Party Size is perfect for those who find their cheesy triangles go missing before it’s time to start cooking.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Arnott’s Iced VoVo sweet biscuits are a treasured golden biscuit topped with pink fondant, a strip of jammy raspberry and a sprinkling of coconut. These classic sweet coconut sprinkled iced biscuits have been an Australian icon since 1906.

Just the perfect nostalgic snack, Arnott’s Iced VoVo biscuits are a nice way to add a little fancy to your day. This delicate sweet biscuit is perfect for eating on its own as a me-time treat or accompanied with your favourite hot evening cuppa. Packaged in a convenient pack, these iced biscuits are great for taking on the go or enjoying at home.

• Golden sweet biscuit with pink icing, jammy raspberry and coconut

• An iconic Australian sweet biscuit since 1906

• More than just great taste, these iced biscuits are lickable too

• Iced VoVo biscuits are Aussie made and Aussie loved, making them an enjoyable treat for kids and adults

• Bring back cherished memories with every bite of these Iced VoVo biscuits
